title: Artificial Intelligence
description: Intelligent methods for perception, reasoning, decision-making, and responsible automation.

title: Machine Learning
description: Data-driven predictive and descriptive modelling for scientific and applied problems.

title: Deep Learning
description: Representation learning with deep neural architectures for complex and high-dimensional data.

title: Metaheuristic Optimization
description: Robust nature-inspired search methods for complex, nonlinear, and constrained optimization tasks.

title: Artificial Algae Algorithm
description: Bio-inspired population-based optimization based on the adaptive behaviour of algal colonies.

title: Federated Learning
description: Collaborative model training that supports distributed data ownership and privacy-aware learning.

title: Semi-supervised Learning
description: Learning approaches that combine limited labelled data with abundant unlabelled data.

title: Medical Image Segmentation
description: Computational analysis and segmentation of medical images to support clinical research workflows.

title: Data Science
description: Data analysis, modelling, and interpretation for evidence-based insight and decision-making.

title: Decision Support Systems
description: AI-enabled systems that support transparent, data-informed operational decisions.

title: Industrial AI Applications
description: Applied AI and optimization methods for industrial processes, quality, and operational intelligence.
